data.title: 国际服卡池复刻「My outfit won't hinder my prayers, even if it's just a swimsuit.」&「Hey, Sensei... I hope you don't mind... I... made you a drink.」

data.body:
[Unique Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Unique Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 3/31 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Ui (Swimsuit), 3★ Hinata (Swimsuit)
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 3/31 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 4/7 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
